seoTitle: Devenish vs Devon Meadows — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Devenish and Devon Meadows. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Devenish vs Devon Meadows: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Devenish and Devon Meadows.
heading: Devenish vs Devon Meadows — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Devenish, Victoria and Devon Meadows, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Devenish has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Devon Meadows (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Devenish or Devon Meadows safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Devenish has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Devon Meadows scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Devenish scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Devon Meadows scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Devenish or Devon Meadows?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Devenish has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
